1.description: fetch Lillestrøm municipality id and geometry

2.description: fetch quick-clay hazard polygons within the municipality (pre-filter by kommunenummer from step 1)

4.description: fetch 1km grid cells overlapping the municipality

5.description: select parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons

6.description: assign hazard parcels to 1km grid cells by intersection

8.description: sort grid cells by parcel count descending

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Lillestrøm'

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Lillestrøm'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT id, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('SELECTED_GEOM'),4326),25833))) = TRUE;

1.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson

WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Lillestrøm'

2.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard polygons intersecting the municipality (geometry will be embedded after step 1)

3.description: Fetch parcels (teig) in the municipality filtered by kommunenummer

4.description: Fetch 1 km grid cells intersecting the municipality (geometry will be embedded after step 1)

5.description: Select parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons (parcels in hazard areas)

6.description: Join parcels-in-hazard with 1 km grid cells to assign each parcel to a cell

8.description: Sort grid cells by parcel count descending

FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3205'

4.sql:
SELECT lokalid, ssbid1000m, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[10.8,59.9],[11.2,59.9],[11.2,60.1],[10.8,60.1],[10.8,59.9]]]}'),4326),25833))
